news.summary: <p>Residents warned not to enter damaged homes or other buildings owing to threat of aftershocks after magnitude-7.8 quake</p><p>A magnitude-7.8 earthquake shook part of the southern Philippines early on Monday, collapsing buildings and killing at least 19 people.</p><p&gt

news.headline: New York stabbing, Kansas City shooting raise World Cup security concerns
news.summary: Six people were stabbed in New York and nine injured in Kansas City, days before the World Cup's opening weekend.

news.headline: Yemen’s Houthis declare ban on Israeli ships sailing the Red Sea
news.summary: Yemen’s Houthis have declared a ‘total ban’ on Israeli vessels wanting to pass through the Red Sea.

news.headline: Magnitude 7.8 earthquake rocks southern Philippines
news.summary: At least 15 people were killed and 129 injured in a magnitude 7.8 earthquake that struck the southern Philippines.
